caption: AI Operation
description: Stamps AI context onto data-plane events — tool calls, file operations, process launches, etc. — so that any action can be attributed to a model, an agent, or a delegation. Four independent concerns, each independently optional: populate what applies. For agent-mediated operations, model identity is carried within ai_agent.ai_model; the standalone ai_model attribute covers direct model invocations without an autonomous agent. Control-plane events (delegation_activity, agent_activity) declare their own agent and delegation attributes directly and do not use this profile.
name: ai_operation

ai_model.description: The AI model involved in this operation. Use for direct model invocations (e.g., a stateless LLM API call) where no autonomous agent is involved. For agent-mediated operations, model identity is carried within ai_agent.ai_model instead.

ai_agent.description: The autonomous AI agent that performed this action. Carries model identity via ai_agent.ai_model. Populate when the action was performed by an agent operating under delegated authority rather than a direct model call.

message_context.description: Conversation metadata such as token counts and message-level detail.

delegation.description: The delegation under whose authority this action was performed. Links the event to a durable authorization context independent of traces and sessions. Enables queries like 'show me everything this delegation did.'
